div1.entryFree: Face-royal, a kingly visage, and the visage stamped on the coin called a royal: he will not stick to say his face is a f.: God may finish it when he will, 'tis not a hair amiss yet: he may keep it still at a f., for a barber shall never earn sixpence out of it, H4B I, 2, 26--28 (i. e. he may keep it at the full value of a royal. F2. H4B I, 2, 26 4 and M. Edd. he may keep it still as a f.).
